assets.name: Fekola Complex
assets.notes: 2025 guidance midpoint: 515-550 koz (532.5 koz). Fekola Underground expected 30-40 koz in 2025; Fekola Regional expected meaningful contribution from 2026 onward. Years 2-5 modeled with non-flat ramp/plateau profile instead of a constant value. 2025 AISC midpoint: $1,625/oz. Currency: USD. Ownership: 80% Fekola Mine, 65% Fekola Regional.

assets.name: Otjikoto Mine
assets.notes: 2025 guidance midpoint: 185-205 koz = 195 koz. Years 2-5 use a non-flat profile around guidance midpoint to reflect normal sequencing. 2025 AISC midpoint: $995/oz. Currency: USD. Ownership: 90%. Antelope contribution potential exists for outer years.

assets.name: Masbate Gold Project
assets.notes: 2025 guidance midpoint: 190-210 koz = 200 koz. Years 2-5 modeled as non-flat around guidance midpoint. 2025 AISC midpoint: $1,275/oz. Currency: USD. Ownership: 100% project basis.

assets.name: Goose Mine
assets.notes: 2025 guidance midpoint: 80-110 koz = 95 koz (post-commercial). 2026 guidance 250 koz and 2027 guidance 330 koz disclosed; Years 4-5 modeled at high but non-flat steady-state levels. 2025 AISC midpoint: $1,970/oz. Capex is front-loaded during ramp-up and then declines. Currency: USD. Ownership: 100%.
